name: CredKin
location: InstaKin's purpose-driven remittance model is reimagining the future of FinTech for migrant families. The team, led by Yasir Shirazi has developed a best-in-class remittance product that grants access to funds for families across diasporas in a safe & convenient manner while providing significant rewards. Instakin achieved 20K users in 2021 and reached $1.2m in GMV. The company is backed by Antler, Y Combinator, Magic Fund, and several strategic angels.

name: PowerX
location: PowerX is the Nest for water heating. Its plug-and-play unit runs heaters more efficiently and converts them to utility-grade thermal batteries for grid balancing. PowerX is risk-free and attaches in minutes to 90% of existing water heaters. It saves users up to 65% on water heating cost and significantly reduces CO2 emissions. With PowerX, users save on energy expenses, utilities save by using water heaters as batteries for load balancing, and private grid companies pay for usage data

name: Watson
location: Watson makes rent rewarding. We enable landlords to offer their residents cash back on rent, along with deals for local and online merchants. Landlords get increased leasing velocity and tenant retention. Renters get a way to build equity by paying rent. Neighborhood businesses get local, sustained traffic. Online brands get exposure to movers with high spending intent. Our vision is a more equitable housing model for 100mm renters, landlords, and neighborhood businesses.

name: Wharf fka Dots
location: Dots (YC S21) helps companies interact with customers through their Slack or Discord customer communities in order to increase retention and drive revenue. Email is overloaded, and companies are already using chat communities to interact with customers. We enable b2b companies to scale interactions by automating manual tasks, such as DM-ing members, and analyzing the activity of key accounts.Companies such as Lattice, Confluent, On Deck and Culture Amp are using Dots already, and we have grown 40% MoM during YC. Sanket (ex-McKinsey) and Pranav (Princeton CS) are technical co-founders, and have been close friends since high school. Here's our product hunt launch.
